sources.name: bilibili_hot_videos_real

page_actions.script: () => { const closeButton = document.querySelector('.login-tip .close'); if (closeButton instanceof HTMLElement) { closeButton.click(); } return document.querySelectorAll('.bili-video-card.video-card').length || document.querySelectorAll('.video-card').length; }

sources.extract_js: () => { const normalize = (value) => (value || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const toAbsoluteUrl = (value) => { try { return new URL(value, window.location.origin).href; } catch { return ''; } }; const cards = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.bili-video-card.video-card, .video-card')); const seen = new Set(); const items = cards.map((card) => { const anchor = card.querySelector('a[href*="/video/"]'); const titleWrap = card.querySelector('.bili-video-card__title'); const titleLink = titleWrap?.querySelector('a[href]'); const subtitleSpans = Array.from(card.querySelectorAll('.bili-video-card__subtitle span')).map((node) => normalize(node.getAttribute('title') || node.textContent)).filter(Boolean); const statSpans = Array.from(card.querySelectorAll('.bili-cover-card__stat span')).map((node) => normalize(node.textContent)).filter(Boolean); const title = normalize(titleWrap?.getAttribute('title') || titleLink?.textContent || ''); const url = toAbsoluteUrl(titleLink?.getAttribute('href') || anchor?.getAttribute('href') || anchor?.href || ''); const published = subtitleSpans.find((item) => /\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}/.test(item)) || ''; const content = normalize([...subtitleSpans.filter((item) => item !== published), ...statSpans].filter(Boolean).join(' | ')); return { title, content, url, published_at: published.replace(/^.*?\s*[路|]\s*/, '') }; }).filter((item) => item.title && item.url && !seen.has(item.url) && seen.add(item.url)); return { items }; }

page_actions.script: () => { const closeButton = document.querySelector('.login-tip .close'); if (closeButton instanceof HTMLElement) { closeButton.click(); } return document.querySelectorAll('a[href*="/video/BV"]').length; }

seed_source.extract_js: () => { const normalize = (value) => (value || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const toAbsoluteUrl = (value) => { try { return new URL(value, window.location.origin).href; } catch { return ''; } }; const cards = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.video-list-item .bili-video-card, .bili-video-card')); const seen = new Set(); const items = []; for (const card of cards) { const infoAnchor = card.querySelector('.bili-video-card__info--right a[href*="/video/BV"]'); const fallbackAnchor = card.querySelector('a[href*="/video/BV"]'); const anchor = infoAnchor || fallbackAnchor; const url = toAbsoluteUrl(anchor?.getAttribute('href') || anchor?.href || ''); if (!url || !/\/video\/BV/i.test(url) || seen.has(url)) { continue; } const titleNode = card.querySelector('.bili-video-card__info--tit'); const imageNode = card.querySelector('picture img[alt]'); const title = normalize(titleNode?.getAttribute('title') || titleNode?.textContent || imageNode?.getAttribute('alt') || anchor?.getAttribute('title') || ''); if (!title) { continue; } const metaNodes = Array.from(card.querySelectorAll('.bili-video-card__info--bottom, .bili-video-card__stats')); const metaText = normalize(metaNodes.map((node) => normalize(node.textContent)).filter(Boolean).join(' | ')); items.push({ title, content: metaText.slice(0, 240), url, published_at: '' }); seen.add(url); } return { items }; }
